name: Chocolate Malt Cake # 2
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 375°F.
2. In a large bowl, combine butter and sugar until light and fluffy. Add malted milk powder and cocoa, beating just until mixed.
3. Add eggs, beating well. Sift together dry ingredients, then add to chocolate mixture alternately with half and half. Spread evenly in a greased 9x13-inch pan.
4. Bake for 35-40 minutes or until done. Let cool completely in the pan.
5. For frosting: In a medium bowl, combine half and half and malted milk powder. Stir to combine, then let stand 15 minutes to dissolve the powder.
6. In another medium bowl, beat together butter and cocoa. Add the malted milk mixture, beating well. Gradually add powdered sugar and beat on high until smooth.
7. Frost cake.
